rows.property: m405 - 405 S Maple St Spokane, WA 99201
rows.amenities: parking lot, Off-Street Parking, On Site Laundry, Secured Building Entry, Beautiful Hardwood Floors, Recently renovated, On Bus Route, Refrigerator, historic building, Mailboxes in Building, near downtown, new appliances, Oven/Stove
rows.address: 405 S Maple St Spokane, WA 99201
rows.description:
Downtown Living at 405 S Maple St

Welcome to a well-located property in the heart of downtown Spokane, offering comfortable living with convenient access to everything the city has to offer. Situated near major roadways and within walking distance to restaurants, shopping, and entertainment, this property is ideal for those seeking an accessible urban lifestyle.

-Prime downtown location
-Close to parks and outdoor spaces
-Pet-friendly community
-On-site laundry facilities
-Easy interstate access for commuting
-Walkable to dining, shopping, and entertainment

Residents enjoy a practical and convenient living experience with features designed for everyday comfort.
